scores.rationale: The feedback is repetitive, cut off mid-sentence, and inaccurately praises the essay's argument as well-thought-out. It offers vague suggestions without concrete steps to address the severe grammatical and structural issues.
Identical in content and quality to Variant 1; it misjudges the essay's low score, repeats itself across sections, and lacks actionable guidance due to being abruptly cut off.
Shares the same flaws as the others: superficial references to Venus/NASA, repetitive phrasing across categories, and an abrupt cutoff that prevents any concrete recommendations.
